siteMeta.title: World Cup 2026 Pool — Daily Predictions & Live Leaderboard
siteMeta.description: Predict every World Cup 2026 match. Submit scores before kickoff, earn points on results, and climb a daily and overall leaderboard.

home.title: World Cup 2026 Pool — Predictions & Leaderboard
home.description: Predict every World Cup 2026 match. Submit scores before kickoff, earn points on results, and climb a single global leaderboard.
home.lede: One global pool. Submit an exact-score pick for every fixture before kickoff and your ranking shifts the moment the final whistle blows. No setup, no fees, no excuses.
home.demoFootnote: Demo card · live data appears once matches start.
home.scoringHeadline: Four tiers. One pool. No deadlines after kickoff.
home.scoringSubtitle: Picks lock at kickoff — the database itself rejects late writes.
home.scoringTierExactDetail: Both teams' goal counts called perfectly.
home.scoringTierWinnerDetail: Right team won, but the gap was off.
home.scoringTierMissDetail: Wrong winner. The bracket marches on.
home.scoringFootnote: Tie-breakers and the dirty details live in
home.cadencePickCopy: Submit a score for every fixture, edit until kickoff.
home.cadenceLockCopy: Predictions freeze the moment the ball rolls — enforced at the database.
home.cadenceScoreCopy: Points post instantly when an admin enters the final score.
home.cadenceClimbCopy: The global leaderboard refreshes the moment a result lands.
home.countdownLiveSubhead: Picks open across the bracket — jump to any match.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.description: Scoring rules, tie-breakers, and how the global leaderboard works.
howItWorks.ogDescription: Learn the World Cup 2026 Pool scoring rules: exact scores earn five points, correct winner with goal difference earns three, correct winner earns one.
howItWorks.headline: How it works
howItWorks.lede: Three rules, one pool, picks that lock the second the ball rolls.
howItWorks.section1P1: Predict the exact final score (regulation + extra time, no penalties counted) for every World Cup 2026 match. Open a match's page, enter the two scores, save.
howItWorks.section1P2: You can edit your pick any number of times until kickoff. After kickoff, the database itself refuses any change — no late edits, no exceptions.
howItWorks.section2Tier3: Correct winner (or draw) AND correct goal difference.
howItWorks.section3Intro: When two players share a point total, the higher rank goes to:
howItWorks.section3Item3: Then the earlier most-recent submission timestamp.
howItWorks.section4P1: One ranking across the whole tournament. Every player's total is the sum of points across every finished match — no daily windows, no timezone splits.
howItWorks.section4P2: The board refreshes the moment an admin posts a final score, and ties break on the rules in Section 03.

matches.title: Matches
matches.description: Browse every World Cup 2026 fixture by day, check kickoff times in your timezone, and submit a score prediction before each match locks.
matches.ogDescription: Every World Cup 2026 fixture grouped by day. Submit predictions before kickoff.
matches.headline: Matches
matches.lede: All {total} fixtures, ordered by kickoff. Tap a match to submit your pick. Predictions lock the second kickoff hits.
matches.matchCount: {count, plural, =0 {0 matches} one {# match} other {# matches}}
matches.emptyBody: No matches loaded yet. An admin needs to seed the fixture list before picks can open.

news.title: News
news.description: The latest World Cup 2026 headlines, refreshed throughout the day. Tap any story to read it at the source.
news.ogDescription: Fresh World Cup 2026 headlines, updated throughout the day.
news.headline: News
news.lede: Fresh World Cup 2026 headlines, refreshed through the day. Tap a story to read it at the source.
news.emptyBody: The feed hasn't been filled yet. Check back soon for the latest World Cup 2026 news.

quiz.title: Daily Call
quiz.description: One World Cup question a day. Answer before the day's out, keep your streak, climb the quiz board.
quiz.ogDescription: A daily World Cup trivia question. Answer, keep your streak, climb the quiz leaderboard.
quiz.headline: Daily Call
quiz.lede: One question a day. Answer before midnight UTC to keep your streak alive.
quiz.signInToAnswer: Sign in to answer and earn points.
quiz.answerFailed: Couldn't submit your answer — try again.
quiz.emptyBody: Check back tomorrow for the next Daily Call.
quiz.leaderboardEmpty: No one has played yet — be the first.
quiz.adminLede: Create and schedule the daily question. One question per UTC date.

matchDetail.metaDescriptionNotFound: This match is not in the World Cup 2026 Pool fixture list.
matchDetail.metaDescriptionWithVenue: Predict {home} vs {away} at {venue}. Kickoff {kickoff} UTC. Submit your score before the match locks.
matchDetail.metaDescription: Predict {home} vs {away}. Kickoff {kickoff} UTC. Submit your score before the match locks.
matchDetail.signInPrompt: Sign in to lock a score for {home} vs {away}. You can keep editing until kickoff.
matchDetail.lockedWithPickFinal: Your pick was <home></home>–<away></away>. This match is final — predictions are locked.
matchDetail.lockedWithPickCancelled: Your pick was <home></home>–<away></away>. This match was cancelled — predictions are locked.
matchDetail.lockedWithPickLive: Your pick was <home></home>–<away></away>. This match is live — predictions are locked.
matchDetail.lockedWithPickKickoff: Your pick was <home></home>–<away></away>. Predictions are locked at kickoff.
matchDetail.finalFootnote: Final score lives in the scoreboard above.
matchDetail.missingPickFinal: This match is final and you didn't submit a prediction.
matchDetail.missingPickCancelled: This match was cancelled — no predictions can be submitted.
matchDetail.missingPickLive: This match is live — predictions are locked and you didn't submit one.
matchDetail.missingPickKickoff: Predictions are locked — kickoff has passed and you didn't submit one for this match.

predictionForm.lastSaveWins: Edit any time before kickoff — last save wins.
predictionForm.submitFirst: Submit before kickoff. You can update freely until then.
predictionForm.lockedKickoff: Predictions are locked — kickoff has passed.
predictionForm.lockedFinal: Predictions are locked — match is final.
predictionForm.lockedCancelled: Predictions are locked — match was cancelled.
predictionForm.lockedLive: Predictions are locked — match is live.
predictionForm.errorNotSignedIn: You need to be signed in to submit a prediction.
predictionForm.errorInvalidScores: Scores must be whole numbers between 0 and 20.

leaderboard.description: World Cup 2026 Pool standings. The single overall ranking refreshes the moment an admin enters a final score.
leaderboard.ogDescription: Overall standings for the World Cup 2026 prediction pool. Refreshes after every result.
leaderboard.headline: Leaderboard
leaderboard.lede: One global ranking across the whole tournament. Standings refresh the moment an admin enters a final score.
leaderboard.leaderStat: {points} pts · {count, plural, one {# player} other {# players}}

signIn.title: Sign in
signIn.description: Sign in to the World Cup 2026 Pool with a magic-link email to submit predictions and join the leaderboard.
signIn.lede: We use your email only to identify your picks. No spam, no daily recap blasts — just enough to put your name on the leaderboard.
signIn.bullet1Copy: Submit a precise scoreline for every fixture before kickoff.
signIn.bullet2Copy: Standings shift the moment an admin enters a final score.
signIn.bullet3Copy: Climb a single tournament-wide leaderboard match by match.
signIn.cardLede: Use your email. We'll create the account on the fly if it's your first time.
signIn.newHere: New here? Just enter your email — your account is created instantly.
signIn.checkInboxBody: We sent a sign-in link to {email}. It works once and expires soon.

onboarding.title: Choose a display name
onboarding.headline: Pick a display name
onboarding.lede: This is the name other players see on the leaderboard. 2–32 characters.
onboarding.label: Display name

admin.title: Admin · Matches

admin.lede: Create or edit fixtures and enter final scores. Saving a final score recomputes the leaderboard immediately.
admin.forbiddenBody: This page is restricted. If you should have access, ask the pool owner to mark you as admin.
